name: She's Gotta Have It Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Spray a 9-inch springform pan with cooking spray.
2. In a bowl, combine dry ingredients: flour, cocoa, cornstarch, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together sugar, water, egg whites, corn syrup, instant coffee powder, and vanilla until the sugar is almost dissolved.
4. Gradually beat in the dry ingredients until just smooth.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool completely.
8. Invert the cake onto a plate and remove the pan.
9. To make the glaze, whisk together powdered sugar, water, and vanilla in a bowl until smooth.
10. Spread the glaze evenly over the top of the cooled cake.
11. Drizzle seedless raspberry jam in a spiral pattern over the glaze.
12. Allow the cake to stand for 1 hour before serving.
